steps.theirView: How they might have heard it

interpret.note: ·grounded in their own words, replayable, never made up

yourView.hint: Looking back at the words above, what mattered to you then, and what were you trying to say?

theirView.hint: Step into their shoes: hearing those same words, how might they have understood and felt it?

nextStep.hint: Turn looking back into a step forward — one or two small, doable things.

fact.note: ·just the words as they were said, with the original audio

conversation.loading: Loading what was said in this conversation…
conversation.hint: Start by returning to the words as they were — listen line by line, settle on the facts, then talk about how you see it.
conversation.emptyTranscript: This conversation hasn't been transcribed yet

person.error: Couldn't load what this person said.
person.hint: Start by revisiting what they've said lately — listen line by line, settle on the facts, then talk about how you see it.
person.emptyTitle: Nothing has been attributed to this person yet
person.emptyHint: Once you attribute a speaker to them in a conversation, their words will show up here.
